rationale: Educ. Code §1001.001 defines terms for driver education and licensing; it contains no reference to homestead exemptions, property tax, or appraised value.
quote: "Driver education" means a nonvocational course of instruction that provides the knowledge and hands-on experience to prepare persons for written and practical driving tests that lead to authorization to operate a vehicle.
_note: No overlap between proposed Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption increase and this driver education definitions section.
